title: Move containers to file locks from c/storage
body: This will help prevent synchronization issues. It does add a lot of open file descriptors (one per container we've read into memory), but we can look into solving that once it becomes an issue.

comments.body: Pushed two more commits. Comments should be addressed. I've also removed the independent file locking for the SQLite DB - SQLite already has locking built in, and it's probably better tested and more durable than what I wrote.
@mheon So we still need this patch?
Yeah, this is to move container locking. So we got rid of database locking, and added file locks to all containers.
